purpose: Define the structure, navigation, visuals, metadata, expansion workflow, and reusable authoring conventions for expandable Learning Library HTML lessons.

authoring_philosophy.core_rule: Every section must teach the core idea clearly while remaining permanently expandable.
authoring_philosophy.first_draft_rule: Create a compact first draft with one strong explanation and one worked example. Do not attempt to anticipate every future explanation or problem set.
authoring_philosophy.growth_rule: Expand lessons by inserting new semantic HTML fragments before permanent learning-prompt cards.

navbar_rules.placement: First or leftmost persistent navbar item
navbar_rules.required_html: ← Course Index

document_metadata.storage: Embedded application/json script in the page head

required_order: visual learning prompt when a visual exists or is planned

learning_prompt_cards.placement: At the bottom of the section immediately before the closing section tag
learning_prompt_cards.preservation_rule: Never remove a learning-prompt card after using it
learning_prompt_cards.insertion_rule: Insert returned HTML immediately before the matching card
learning_prompt_cards.fragment_rule: Prompts must request only the new HTML fragment, with no html, head, body, global CSS, or unrelated JavaScript.

smart_prompt_requirements.rule: Each prompt must be specific to its section rather than generic
must_include: instruction to preserve IDs and CSS classes
smart_prompt_requirements.explanation_prompt_template: Expand the section titled "SECTION_TITLE" using the supplied section HTML as context. Deepen the explanation of SECTION_TOPIC, add one additional worked example, and clarify likely beginner confusion. Preserve all existing IDs, classes, and content. Return only the new semantic HTML fragment to insert immediately before this explanation card.
smart_prompt_requirements.practice_prompt_template: Using the supplied HTML for "SECTION_TITLE" as context, create a progressive practice block for SECTION_TOPIC. Include recognition, calculation, explanation, hints, and collapsible solutions. Preserve the current style and return only the new HTML fragment to insert immediately before this practice card.
smart_prompt_requirements.visual_prompt_template: Review the supplied HTML for "SECTION_TITLE" and expand its visual explanation of SECTION_TOPIC. If relationships, structure, or sequence must be explained, return an accessible inline SVG. Otherwise return a named image placeholder. Preserve existing IDs and classes and return only the new HTML fragment to insert immediately before this visual card.

visual_rules.non_diagram_visual: Use a named image placeholder for later generation

connector_rules: Do not route lines through text
layout_rules: Calculate widths, gaps, and margins before placement
Use one row for two to four nodes
Use an aligned two-row layout for five to seven nodes
Split diagrams with more than twelve nodes
Use horizontal scrolling or vertical stacking on narrow screens

image_placeholder_rules.replacement_rule: Replace only the placeholder box with an img element using the exact reserved filename. Preserve the figure ID, caption, and prompt details.

requirements: do not rely on color alone

validation_checklist: Navbar includes a visible Course Index link
Every section has explanation and practice learning-prompt cards
Every visual has a visual learning-prompt card
All expansion prompts request HTML fragments only
Required diagrams use accessible inline SVG
Optional illustrations use reserved document_name_imageNN.png placeholders
Existing content is preserved during expansion
The page remains usable without JavaScript

course.purpose: Provide an overview of a course, explain its goals, prerequisites, and serve as the navigation hub for all lessons in the course.

lesson.purpose: Teach a single concept using the expandable lesson structure defined by this ruleset.

curriculum.rule: Course pages and lesson generation must align with the curriculum.
